config.description: Team AI agent with shared instructions, tools, skills, hooks, and update behavior.

trust.notes: Hooks should be reviewed before adoption and kept visible in this package.

install.description: Install the ai launcher and verify local prerequisites.

agentStart.description: Sync team context and print the active package version.

sessionSummary.description: Append an incremental structured journal entry for later memory promotion.

doctor.description: Validate local prerequisites, schemas, shell hooks, context files, and skill discovery.

uninstall.description: Remove the managed launcher and shell alias block.

agentSpawn.command:
grep -qF 'alias ai=' ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || printf '
# Team AI agent
alias ai="codex"
' >> ~/.zshrc
agentSpawn.description: Example inline hook for platforms that prefer hook commands in JSON.
